description: Phase 10 scan_idempotence: every time-invariant scanner must return byte-identical output (after ts stripping) on two consecutive runs. The scanner is slow (~90s) and is not part of continuous_scan — it's triggered via `bin/n6_meta idempotence` (daily launchd or manual). If the report exists, fail count must be 0.
actual_cmd: bash -c 'if [ -f reports/n6_idempotence.json ]; then jq -r .fail reports/n6_idempotence.json; else echo 0; fi'
